cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to work through this problem step by step. David saw Sean buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 8am. 4. Betty saw Sean buying clothes at the mall from 8am to 9am. 5. Linda saw Sean sitting on a rooftop from 9am to 5pm. 6. Tiffany saw Sean driving to the water park from 8pm to 9pm. 7. The bakery was closed after 9pm. The question is whether Sean could have gone to the bakery during any of the given time slots (A to D). Let me break down Sean's schedule: - 5am: Wakes up. - 5am to 6am: In class at school (per James). - 6am to 8am: Buying lunch at the deli (per David). - 8am to 9am: Buying clothes at the mall (per Betty). - 9am to 5pm: Sitting on a rooftop (per Linda). - 8pm to 9pm: Driving to the water park (per Tiffany). - Bakery closed after 9pm.
